title: Marketplace Manager - BikeDekho Advisory Limited - Attractive Package

jsonLd.title: Marketplace Manager - BikeDekho Advisory Limited - Attractive Package
jsonLd.description:
Join the BikeDekho Advisory Limited family as a Marketplace Manager in Varanasi. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About BikeDekho Advisory Limited:
BikeDekho Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in WooCommerce

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Life and accident insurance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Varanasi, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with BikeDekho Advisory Limited!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
